Profile

Award-winning Creative Director.

15+ years building Africa-centred IP for global audiences. Equally at home in a writer's room, an animation studio, and a publisher's editorial pipeline.

Credits span Disney Publishing Worldwide, the African Union, Africa CDC, GIZ Germany, the Erika-Fuchs-Haus Museum (Germany), and the Young Brent Foundation (UK).

Recognised internationally for translating cultural specificity into commercially scalable content. Known for developing talent and consistently delivering work that reaches millions.

Selected Work

Projects

Animation

Project 01

UMOJA

Animated Health Series · African Union

A continent-wide animated public health series commissioned by the African Union, Africa CDC and GIZ Germany. Reached 20M+ viewers — one of the most widely viewed African-produced animations of its year. Role: Creative Director.

Co-Production

Project 02

IGBOYA

International Animated Co-Production

Nigeria · France · Barbados co-production. 5 international film festival selections across Africa, Europe and the Americas. All participations supported by the French Government. Role: Director.

Comics

Project 03

Adunni & Lazer Boy

Youth Comics · Mapleleaf Press

Superhero comic commissioned by the African Union and Africa CDC. Co-published with Mapleleaf Press. 300,000+ copies in circulation. Role: Creative Director · Writer.

Comics

Project 04

HOPPAS

Sports Action Comic · Guereza Comics

A high-energy sports action comic where elite athletes unlock extraordinary abilities. Bold visual storytelling rooted in African youth culture. Role: Creative Director · Writer.

Editorial

Project 05

Chronicles of the Nowborn

Peda Comics · Executive Producer

Led editorial and production operations at Peda Comics. Shaped creative direction, managed writers and artists, and drove original African titles from concept through to publication. Role: Executive Producer · Senior Editor.

Creator-owned

Project 06

Under the Sun

Political Thriller · Peda Comics

A political thriller tackling migration, power and survival across nations. Created and written by Augustine — demonstrating his range across genres and storytelling formats. Role: Creator · Writer.

Disney Publishing

Editorial Work

Kugali Media & Disney Publishing Worldwide

Story Editor · Sept 2022 – Present

Partner with Disney Publishing Worldwide — evaluating pitches, editing manuscripts, shaping narratives that represent Africa globally. Led the Murenga companion book and contributed to Kugali and the Art of Bonzo, exhibited at the Erika-Fuchs-Haus Museum, Germany.

USC School of Creative Arts

Animation Production Certificate

2023

BSc Library & Information Science
Delta State University · 2005–2008
